label: frontier • one run: todo → files → db → shell verify → artifact → complete
query: Complete this workflow, tracking every step with a todo list that you update as you go: (1) read the three order files under orders/; (2) in your agent database create a table orders with columns id (TEXT) and amount (INTEGER) and insert one row per order; (3) query the table to compute the total amount; (4) write summary.md containing the line 'Total: <total>'; (5) verify by running 'zsh verify.sh' and make sure it prints ok; (6) share summary.md with me as an artifact; (7) then mark the task complete with a short summary.
notes: Composite stress: every loop surface in one run with ordering pinned (todo before db work, artifact before complete) and a tool-call ceiling against aimless wandering. dbState pins persisted rows (COUNT 3, SUM 47); verify.sh pins the workspace outcome.
